headline: ROYAL CARIBBEAN GROUP ENHANCES TRAVEL LOYALTY, PARTNERS WITH BANK OF AMERICA TO LAUNCH ROYAL ONE™ AND ROYAL ONE PLUS™ CREDIT CARDS
summary: Today, Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) and Bank of America announced the upcoming launch of the Royal ONE™ Visa Signature® and Royal ONE Plus™ Visa Signature® credit cards — the industry's first tri-branded cards that simplify how travelers earn and redeem rewards across the company's brands: Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, and Silversea. headline: JPMorgan or Bank of America: Jefferies Names the Top Banking Stock to Buy for 2026
summary: Large-cap banks have long appealed to investors for a few core reasons – they tend to generate steady earnings through net interest income, benefit from higher rates via wider lending spreads, and return a meaningful share of profits through dividends. Their scale and diversified revenue streams, spanning lending, trading, and advisory, also help cushion performance across cycles.
